channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 5 great Amazon Prime benefits you’re probably not using
item.description: Let’s address the elephant in the room: Amazon Prime membership costs aren’t getting any cheaper. My credit card just caught the brunt of the yearly auto-renewal.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: What to know about the Meta glasses the New Orleans attacker used to scout the French Quarter
item.description: The FBI says the New Orleans truck attacker who killed 14 people had previously scouted the French Quarter and recorded video with his Meta smart glasses.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: China protests US sanctions for its alleged role in hacking, complains of foreign hacker attacks
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has slammed a decision by the U.S. Treasury to sanction a Beijing-based cybersecurity company for its alleged role in multiple hacking incidents targeting critical U.S. infrastructure, while the Chinese cyber security agency complained Monday of attacks on Chinese networks.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: China protests US sanctions for its alleged role in hacking, complains of foreign hacker attacks
item.description: China has slammed a decision by the U.S. Treasury to sanction a Beijing-based cybersecurity company for its alleged role in multiple hacking incidents targeting critical U.S. infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Elaine Kurtenbach, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Samsung’s Ballie robot companion still comes in yellow, but has more AI and a promised 2025 launch
item.description: TechRadar saw the cheerful yellow robot and chatted with Samsung's Head of Home Entertainment Product
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Find out who’s behind any phone number with this free lookup tool
item.description: I don’t know about you, but practically every time my phone rings, my heart rate starts skyrocketing.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: Appeals court blocks return of US net neutrality rules for ISPs
item.description: The reintroduction of neutrality rules for network providers is looking increasingly unlikely, at least for the next five years, after a US appeals court blocked efforts by the US Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to reinstate them.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Easy internet sleuth tricks you’ll wish you knew sooner
item.description: Here are some powerful online sleuthing tricks you can use to check the credibility of a website, see old pictures of places you've lived and even learn more about your neighbors.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joel Kaplan to replace Nick Clegg as Meta global policy leader
item.description: Meta will switch up its global policy team in the new year and has appointed former George W. Bush administration official Joel Kaplan to replace Nick Clegg as the company's chief global affairs officer.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: What is Turo? Car rental app used in New Orleans and Las Vegas
item.description: Turo, a San Francisco-based company founded in 2010, operates differently from traditional car rental services.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: The US government must keep pace with serving an AI-empowered citizenry
item.description: Our government needs to maintain trust through competence, and that competence will increasingly be about powering government services with AI. The post The US government must keep pace with serving an AI-empowered citizenry first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: How to use Gemini AI to make templates in Google Sheets
item.description: Need ideas or motivation to help you build a spreadsheet in Google Sheets? You can browse through the templates that are included in this office app and select one to customize. But a more intriguing option is to use the tool in Sheets called Help Me Organize.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Rhode Islanders' data was leaked from a cyberattack on state health benefits website
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (AP) — Cybercriminals who hacked Rhode Island’s system for health and benefits programs have released files to a site on the dark web, a scenario the state has been preparing for, Gov. Daniel McKee said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
